description: 30-query regression + coverage set for /search. Mix of (a) tier-1 category anchors, (b) Reddit-eval queries with structural-stopword noise stripped (the tokenizer fix already drops `topics` / `theme` etc, so the eval input uses the clean form a user would actually type), (c) user-reported bad cases as a regression suite, (d) long-tail queries we've tested. `expected` is calibrated to the current catalog so the run baselines as PASS=most; re-run scripts/eval_search.cjs after any change to search/page.tsx, lib/searchRewrite.ts, or scripts/topup_search_aliases.py and watch for verdicts shifting to WARN/FAIL.

expected_legend.rich: >= 10 effective inspirations (strict if any; else relaxed-OR fallback)
expected_legend.empty: 0 — should fire search_noresult event (UNLESS rewriter recovers, in which case page renders rewrites and no event fires)
expected_legend.redirect: /topics/<slug> redirect on page.tsx — script can't simulate; verify manually in prod
expected_legend.rewrite_recovery: original is thin/empty, LLM rewrite is expected to surface catalog hits via union
expected_legend.rewrite_empty: LLM rewrite should return [] (unmappable query — gibberish, proper noun, off-catalog)

Was theme 4. Real content gap — no homophone templates in catalog. Should fire search_noresult
Topic slug — page.tsx redirects to /topics/english-chinese before catalog scoring. Script's catalog-scoring returns 0 but rewrites recover; manual prod verify the redirect still fires
Was theme 7. Native-english-expressions + chinese-verb-opposite + kids-opposite-concept; relaxed-OR catches it
Was theme 9. Per-country MBTI / culture cards got `global` alias top-up — 400+ hits via bigram-on-alias
Was theme 10. Travel destination / map templates aliased post-2026-05-18
Was theme 11. Strict-AND on all 3 tokens too narrow; relaxed-OR also empty. Open gap — alias top-up candidate
Was theme 12. Relaxed-OR catches via `city` + `escapes`. Note the intent-mismatch concern (architectural 3D models surface instead of itineraries) — item 4 on shortlist
Was theme 13. Only 2 hits via relaxed-OR. Open gap — needs world-cuisines alias top-up
Was empty pre-alias-topup. Post-topup: 133+ hits via CJK bigram on 唯美 + 春天. Regression target.
Was empty pre-alias-topup. Post-topup: 16 hits via CJK bigram on 证件 + 件照 against portrait-retouching aliases. Regression target.
Original is empty (CJK 2-char, no bigrams). Rewriter proposes crafting/watercolor/scrapbook → union recovers ~170+ hits via relaxed-OR. Confirms rescue path.
Arabic — unfamiliar word, likely a name. Pre-prompt-fix the rewriter returned generic catalog defaults; post-fix should return []. Regression target.
Random keystrokes — rewriter should return []. Tracking event content_id should be `ddd|rw=1` (rescue attempted, failed)
Direct template match — template-mbti-marvel has 66+ examples
Watercolor + gardening templates aliased to spring/flowers — bilingual cross-check for 唯美春天
Should hit chinese-verb-opposite + kids-opposite-concept via CJK bigram
Long-tail; only 1 hit today — open content gap
From the 2026-05-15 0%-CTR list. Fashion + red-carpet templates exist but only 1 strict hit — open alias top-up candidate
Multi-token zh: animal + vocabulary. 8 strict hits; rewriter brings to ~130. Watching for regressions
Should hit weddings vocab + celebration posters. Rewriter eval confirms wider recovery via relaxed-OR
